title: koernickea lanata
intro: Koernickea lanata, also known as the woolly Koernickea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. Koernickea lanata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves are commonly used in traditional medicine.
